data.content: Changed update_managed() to only write skills to the preferred (destination) location instead of iterating all installed locations. For Claude, this means project-level .claude/skills/ is updated but user-level ~/.claude/skills/ is left untouched. Added test update_only_writes_to_preferred_location_not_user_level. installed_locations() gated behind #[cfg(test)] since it is no longer used in production code. Branch: worktree-knots-5204-update-project-only. All sanity checks pass, 95.23% coverage.
